findings.source_excerpt: spread by blogging, tweeting, word of mouth, favoriting, plugging it on forums
findings.target_excerpt: lan truyền qua viết blog, tweet, truyền miệng, favoriting, plug trên các diễn đàn
findings.description: English prose words 'favoriting' and 'plug' left untranslated inside Vietnamese text (blog/tweet are accepted loanwords). These also appear in the reference source, so this may be an intentional informal author's-note style.
findings.suggested_fix: lan truyền qua viết blog, tweet, truyền miệng, thêm vào yêu thích, quảng bá trên các diễn đàn

summary: Short Omake/bridge chapter; target faithfully matches source with no typos, omissions, or distortions, only minor untranslated English loanwords ('favoriting', 'plug') that also exist in the source.
